title.en: Time for Tuchel to show hand as England enter World Cup danger zone

summary.en: England coach Thomas Tuchel must now play his strongest hand as he enters the danger zone in a World Cup of shocks, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 首席足球作家菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）说，英格兰教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）在世界杯的冲击中进入危险区域时，现在必须发挥他最强大的

title.en: United, free and brilliant - can anyone stop France masterclass?
title.zh-CN: 团结、自由、才华横溢--有人能阻止法国大师班吗？

summary.en: France boss Didier Deschamps urges caution despite watching his side dismantle Sweden to leave Les Bleus fans dreaming of winning the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）敦促谨慎行事，尽管他看着自己的球队拆除瑞典队，让蓝军球迷梦想着赢得世界杯。

title.en: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥城世界杯庆祝活动中有三人死亡

summary.en: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
summary.zh-CN: 周二，超过一百万人走上墨西哥城街头，纪念该国战胜厄瓜多尔。

title.en: Scouting DR Congo - where England can win the game
title.zh-CN: 在刚果民主共和国侦察--英格兰可以在这里赢得比赛

summary.en: England play DR Congo in the World Cup round of 32 on Wednesday. BBC Sport looks at what dangers the African side possess.

title.en: Mexico set up potential England tie with win over 10-man Ecuador

summary.en: Mexico cruise into the last 16 of the World Cup with a comfortable victory over Ecuador in a weather-delayed contest at the Azteca Stadium.

title.en: Tuchel will stick to Southgate's penalty plan

title.en: England right-backs Quansah and James out of DR Congo game
